title: Set column as mandatory
excerpt: How can I make sure a status column is not changed if another column is not filled?

posts.author: rivkam (Rivka)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I make sure a status column is not changed if another column is not filled?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rivkam Hey, I suggest you try an app named Workflow(link below).

It does exactly what you’re asking for. It allows to set required columns per step.

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can set a simple automation as a check.

If the status changes and the column is empty, change it back to the same status

I hope this sorts your issue.

Signature for response

Zaki

Business Workflow Consultant

Ready Logic
